seoTitle: Barrack Heights vs Barrack Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Barrack Heights and Barrack Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Barrack Heights vs Barrack Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barrack Heights and Barrack Point.
heading: Barrack Heights vs Barrack Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barrack Heights, New South Wales and Barrack Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barrack Point has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Barrack Heights (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barrack Heights or Barrack Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barrack Heights has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Barrack Point scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barrack Heights scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Barrack Point scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barrack Heights or Barrack Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barrack Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
